ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
btColor = {r=1, g=0, b=0}
scriptStr = ''
windowOpened = 0
targetObj = nil
function onLoad(en_state)
    local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
    if state ~= nil then
        if state.str ~= nil then
            scriptStr = state.str
        end
    end
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=-0.46}, scale={4, 4, 3.4}, color={1, 0, 0}, 
        click_function='setScript', function_owner=self, tooltip='Set the script'})
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=0.36}, scale={4, 4, 3.4}, color={0, 0.8, 0}, 
        click_function='runScript', function_owner=self, tooltip='Run the script'})
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'egr50oi8jh' then
            objs[i].destroyObject()
        end
    end
end

function onEndEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute('if', 'text', value)
    scriptStr = value
end

function setScript(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    if windowOpened == 0 then
        windowOpened = 1
        self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('if', 'text', scriptStr)
    else
        windowOpened = 0
        self.UI.setAttribute('mainPanel', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function runScript(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    local zobj = nil
    if targetObj ~= nil then
        targetObj.destroyObject()
    end
    local pos = self.getPosition()
    local spawnParams = {
        type = 'ScriptingTrigger',
        position = {x=0, y=-500, z=0},
        scale = {x=0.01, y=0.01, z=0.01},
    }
    targetObj = spawnObject(spawnParams)
    targetObj.setName('egr50oi8jh')
    local pre_str = [=[function userFunction()

]=]
    local post_str = [=[

self.destroyObject()
end]=]
    targetObj.setLuaScript(pre_str .. scriptStr .. post_str)
    Wait.frames(function ()
        targetObj.call('userFunction')
    end, 20)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        str = scriptStr
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:
<Panel id="mainPanel" active="false" position="-200 0 -100" rotation="0 0 180" width="800" height="1000" color="#FFFFFF88" scale="0.4 0.4 0.4">
<InputField id="if" width="750" height="950" lineType="MultiLineNewLine" onEndEdit="onEndEdit"/>
</Panel>
